event: Picture with a Shell and Blue Bird
description: A surrealist painting depicting an abstract, elongated figure with shell-like or organic forms, holding what appears to be a trident or branch. The figure is rendered in warm earth tones and yellows against a background of orange, brown, and white geometric sections. A small blue bird or insect appears at the right. The style is dreamlike and surreal, with distorted human anatomy merged with organic forms. No biblical or religious content is discernible in this image.

_meta.title: Picture with a Shell and Blue Bird
